```python
class ImportSummary:

    in_scope: int
    already_existing: int
    new_transactions: int
    unmapped: int

    invalid_mapping_errors: list[tuple[str, str]]
    portfolio_total: int
    unique_tickers: int
```

### app/domain/analytics.py

```python
def daily_returns(closes: list[Decimal]) -> list[Decimal]
def volatility_annualised(returns: list[Decimal]) -> Decimal
def drawdown_series(navs: list[Decimal]) -> list[Decimal]
def max_drawdown(navs: list[Decimal]) -> Decimal
def sharpe(returns: list[Decimal], risk_free: Decimal) -> Decimal
def sma(closes: list[Decimal], period: int) -> list[Decimal | None]
def rsi(closes: list[Decimal], period: int) -> list[Decimal | None]
def detect_recent_cross(sma_short: list[Decimal | None], sma_long: list[Decimal | None], *, lookback: int) -> tuple[Literal['golden', 'death', 'none'], int | None]
def correlation_matrix(returns_by_ticker: dict[str, list[Decimal]]) -> dict[str, dict[str, Decimal]]
def correlation_clusters(matrix: dict[str, dict[str, Decimal]], threshold: Decimal, min_size: int) -> list[list[str]]
def herfindahl_index(weights_pct: list[Decimal]) -> Decimal
```

### app/domain/analytics_views.py

```python
class ConcentrationRow(BaseModel):
    ticker: str
    name: str
    weight_pct: Decimal
    value_eur: Money
    currency: Currency
    thesis_status: str | None
    staleness_reason: str | None
    def validate_weight_pct(cls, value: Decimal) -> Decimal
    def validate_value_eur(cls, value: Money) -> Money
class ConcentrationView(BaseModel):
    top_1_pct: Decimal
    top_3_pct: Decimal
    herfindahl: Decimal
    weights_by_ticker: list[tuple[str, Decimal]]
    currency_split: list[tuple[Currency, Decimal]]
    rows: list[ConcentrationRow]
    def validate_non_negative(cls, value: Decimal) -> Decimal
    def validate_top_3_includes_top_1(self) -> ConcentrationView
class CurrentPositionCard(BaseModel):
    ticker: str
    name: str
    weight_pct: Decimal
    market_value_eur: Money
    last_price_native: Money
    last_price_eur: Money
    open_lot_count: int
    staleness: str | None
    def validate_weight_pct(cls, value: Decimal) -> Decimal
    def validate_eur_money(cls, value: Money) -> Money
    def validate_non_negative_money(cls, value: Money) -> Money
    def validate_open_lot_count(cls, value: int) -> int
class RiskBasedResult(BaseModel):
    shares: Decimal
    trade_value_eur: Money
    risk_eur: Money
    risk_pct_input: Decimal
    stop_price_native: Money
    def validate_eur_money(cls, value: Money) -> Money
    def validate_non_negative_money(cls, value: Money) -> Money
class WeightBasedResult(BaseModel):
    shares: Decimal
    delta_eur: Money
    current_weight_pct: Decimal
    target_weight_pct: Decimal
    def validate_delta_eur(cls, value: Money) -> Money
    def validate_weight_pct(cls, value: Decimal) -> Decimal
class PostTradeWeightPreview(BaseModel):
    current_weight_pct: Decimal
    new_weight_pct: Decimal
    bucket: Literal['green', 'amber', 'red']
    def validate_weight_pct(cls, value: Decimal) -> Decimal
class SizerView(BaseModel):
    current: CurrentPositionCard
    risk_based: RiskBasedResult | None
    weight_based: WeightBasedResult | None
    post_trade: PostTradeWeightPreview | None
    degraded_reason: str | None
```

### app/domain/company.py

```python
class CompanyProfile(BaseModel):
    ticker: str
    name: str
    isin: str | None
    sector: str | None
    industry: str | None
    country: str | None
    currency: str
    employees: int | None
    market_cap: Money | None
    long_description: str | None
class LatestQuote(BaseModel):
    ticker: str
    price: Money
    previous_close: Money
    day_change_pct: Decimal
    as_of: datetime
class PriceHistoryPoint(BaseModel):
    date: date
    close: Decimal
    volume: int | None
class QuarterlyFundamentals(BaseModel):
    period_end: date
    revenue: Decimal | None
    gross_profit: Decimal | None
    operating_income: Decimal | None
    net_income: Decimal | None
    free_cash_flow: Decimal | None
    eps_diluted: Decimal | None
    shares_diluted: int | None
    total_debt: Decimal | None
    cash_and_equivalents: Decimal | None
    net_debt: Decimal | None
    ebitda: Decimal | None
    currency: str
class AnnualFundamentals(BaseModel):
    fiscal_year: int
    period_end: date
    revenue: Decimal | None
    gross_profit: Decimal | None
    operating_income: Decimal | None
    net_income: Decimal | None
    free_cash_flow: Decimal | None
    eps_diluted: Decimal | None
    shares_diluted: int | None
    total_debt: Decimal | None
    cash_and_equivalents: Decimal | None
    net_debt: Decimal | None
    ebitda: Decimal | None
    capex: Decimal | None
    buybacks: Decimal | None
    dividends_paid: Decimal | None
    stock_based_compensation: Decimal | None
    currency: str
class CurrentMultiples(BaseModel):
    as_of: datetime
    pe_trailing: Decimal | None
    ps_trailing: Decimal | None
    ev_ebitda: Decimal | None
    p_fcf: Decimal | None
    p_book: Decimal | None
    dividend_yield_pct: Decimal | None
class DividendEvent(BaseModel):
    ex_date: date
    amount_per_share: Decimal
    currency: str
class InstitutionalHolder(BaseModel):
    name: str
    shares_held: int
    pct_of_shares_outstanding: Decimal
    shares_change_qoq: int | None
    as_of: date
class InsiderTransaction(BaseModel):
    insider_name: str
    insider_title: str | None
    transaction_date: date
    transaction_type: Literal['BUY', 'SELL', 'OPTION_EXERCISE', 'OTHER']
    shares: int
    price_per_share: Decimal | None
    value: Decimal | None
class OwnershipSnapshot(BaseModel):
    as_of: date
    insider_ownership_pct: Decimal | None
    institutional_ownership_pct: Decimal | None
    top_institutional_holders: list[InstitutionalHolder]
    recent_insider_transactions: list[InsiderTransaction]
class NextCatalyst(BaseModel):
    kind: Literal['EARNINGS', 'DIVIDEND', 'EX_DIVIDEND', 'SPLIT']
    date: date
    detail: str | None
class CompanyData(BaseModel):
    ticker: str
    profile: CompanyProfile | None
    latest_quote: LatestQuote | None
    price_history: list[PriceHistoryPoint]
    quarterly_fundamentals: list[QuarterlyFundamentals]
    annual_fundamentals: list[AnnualFundamentals]
    current_multiples: CurrentMultiples | None
    dividends: list[DividendEvent]
    ownership: OwnershipSnapshot | None
    next_catalyst: NextCatalyst | None
    profile_fetched_at: datetime | None
    prices_fetched_at: datetime | None
    financials_fetched_at: datetime | None
    fetch_errors: dict[str, str]
```

### app/domain/csv_import.py

```python
class RowStatus(StrEnum):
class PlannedAction(StrEnum):
class PlannedRow(BaseModel):
    row_number: int
    trade_date: date
    csv_type: str
    isin: str
    reference: str
    description: str
    shares: Decimal | None
    price: Decimal | None
    amount: Decimal | None
    fee: Decimal | None
    tax: Decimal | None
    status: RowStatus
    action: PlannedAction
    proposed_ticker: str | None
    conflict_tx_id: str | None
    error_message: str | None
    fx_rate_eur: Decimal | None
class ImportPlan(BaseModel):
    rows: tuple[PlannedRow, ...]
    def count_by_status(self) -> dict[str, int]
```

```python
class ChartPeriod(StrEnum):
    def is_intraday(self) -> bool
class OhlcUnavailableError(Exception):
    def __init__(self, reason: str) -> None
class OhlcBar(BaseModel):
    timestamp: datetime
    open: Decimal
    high: Decimal
    low: Decimal
    close: Decimal
    volume: int | None
class OhlcSeries(BaseModel):
    ticker: str
    currency: Currency
    period: ChartPeriod
    bars: tuple[OhlcBar, ...]
    fetched_at: datetime
    def latest_close(self) -> Decimal
    def period_change_pct(self) -> Decimal | None
def aggregate_ohlc_series(series: OhlcSeries, freq: AggregationFreq) -> OhlcSeries
```

### app/domain/models.py

```python
class TransactionType(StrEnum):
class Transaction(BaseModel):
    id: str
    type: TransactionType
    ticker: str
    trade_date: date
    shares: Decimal
    price_native: Money
    fees_native: Money | None
    fx_rate_eur: Decimal
    notes: str | None
    csv_reference: str | None
    source: Literal['scalable_csv', 'manual', 'switch', 'unknown']
    def ticker_must_be_uppercase(cls, v: str) -> str
    def shares_must_be_positive(cls, v: Decimal) -> Decimal
    def fx_rate_must_be_positive(cls, v: Decimal) -> Decimal
    def validate_ticker_currency(self) -> Transaction
    def validate_eur_fx_rate(self) -> Transaction
    def validate_fees_currency(self) -> Transaction
    def cost_native(self) -> Money
    def cost_eur(self) -> Money
```

```python
class Currency(StrEnum):
```

### app/domain/positions.py

```python
class OpenLot(BaseModel):
    source_transaction_id: str
    ticker: str
    trade_date: date
    remaining_shares: Decimal
    cost_per_share_native: Money
    fx_rate_eur: Decimal
    def validate_shares(self) -> OpenLot
    def cost_basis_eur(self) -> Money
class Position(BaseModel):
    ticker: str
    open_shares: Decimal
    open_lots: tuple[OpenLot, ...]
    realised_gain_eur_ytd: Money
    cost_basis_eur: Money
    def validate_position_consistency(self) -> Position
class LivePosition(BaseModel):
    position: Position
    live_price_native: Money | None
    live_value_eur: Money | None
    unrealised_gain_eur: Money | None
    unrealised_gain_pct: Decimal | None
    current_fx_rate: Decimal | None
    staleness_reason: str | None
    def validate_valuation_consistency(self) -> LivePosition
    def is_stale(self) -> bool
    def ticker(self) -> str
class PortfolioSummary(BaseModel):
    total_value_eur: Money
    total_cost_basis_eur: Money
    total_unrealised_gain_eur: Money
    total_unrealised_gain_pct: Decimal
    total_realised_gain_eur_ytd: Money
    position_count: int
    live_position_count: int
    staleness: Literal['live', 'partial', 'stale']
    as_of: datetime
```

```python
class RealisedGain(BaseModel):

    buy_transaction_id: str
    ticker: str
    shares: Decimal
    sell_date: date
    buy_date: date
    proceeds_eur: Money
    cost_basis_eur: Money
    realised_gain_eur: Money
    holding_period_days: int
    def ticker_must_be_uppercase(cls, v: str) -> str
    def shares_must_be_positive(cls, v: Decimal) -> Decimal
    def validate_currencies(self) -> RealisedGain
    def validate_math(self) -> RealisedGain
    def validate_dates(self) -> RealisedGain
    def is_loss(self) -> bool
```

### app/domain/tax/models.py

```python
class FilingStatus(StrEnum):
class TaxProfile(BaseModel):
    filing_status: FilingStatus
    church_tax_rate: Decimal
class TaxImpact(BaseModel):
    instrument_kind: InstrumentKind
    gross_gain_eur: Money
    teilfreistellung_pct: Decimal
    teilfreistellung_amount_eur: Money
    taxable_gain_after_teilfreistellung_eur: Money
    def validate_currencies(self) -> TaxImpact
    def validate_math(self) -> TaxImpact
class LossPotState(BaseModel):
    prior_year_carryforward_eur: Money
    current_year_losses_eur: Money
    current_year_gains_eur: Money
    consumed_against_gains_eur: Money
    remaining_carryforward_eur: Money
    taxable_after_offset_eur: Money
    def validate_all_eur(self) -> LossPotState
    def validate_taxable_non_negative(self) -> LossPotState
    def current_year_losses_unconsumed_eur(self) -> Money
class HarvestImpact(BaseModel):
    ticker: str
    instrument_kind: InstrumentKind
    unrealised_gain_eur: Money
    taxable_gain_after_teilfreistellung_eur: Money
    incremental_tax_eur: Money
    incremental_soli_eur: Money
    total_incremental_eur: Money
    is_fully_sheltered: bool
    def validate_all_eur(self) -> HarvestImpact
class HarvestImpactReport(BaseModel):
    impacts: dict[str, HarvestImpact]
    stale_tickers: tuple[str, ...]
class TaxYearSummary(BaseModel):
    year: int
    profile: TaxProfile
    aktien_pot: LossPotState
    general_pot: LossPotState
    realised_gain_impacts: tuple[TaxImpact, ...]
    additional_dividend_income_eur: Money
    additional_interest_income_eur: Money
    total_taxable_after_loss_offset_eur: Money
    sparerpauschbetrag_total_eur: Money
    sparerpauschbetrag_consumed_eur: Money
    sparerpauschbetrag_remaining_eur: Money
    taxable_after_allowance_eur: Money
    abgeltungsteuer_eur: Money
    solidaritaetszuschlag_eur: Money
    church_tax_eur: Money
    total_tax_owed_eur: Money
    effective_tax_rate_pct: Decimal | None
    def validate_taxable_after_allowance_non_negative(self) -> TaxYearSummary
class MarginalTaxImpact(BaseModel):
    before_summary: TaxYearSummary
    after_summary: TaxYearSummary
    marginal_taxable_gain_eur: Money
    marginal_allowance_consumed_eur: Money
    marginal_aktien_carryforward_change_eur: Money
    marginal_general_carryforward_change_eur: Money
    marginal_abgeltungsteuer_eur: Money
    marginal_solidaritaetszuschlag_eur: Money
    marginal_total_tax_owed_eur: Money
```

```python
class TaxYearLedger:
    year: int
    rates: TaxYearRates
    profile: TaxProfile
    realised_gains: list[RealisedGain]
    prior_aktien_carryforward: Money
    prior_general_carryforward: Money
    additional_dividend_income_eur: Money
    additional_interest_income_eur: Money
    tax_impacts: list[TaxImpact]
    aktien_impacts: list[TaxImpact]
    general_impacts: list[TaxImpact]
    aktien_current_year_gains: Money
    aktien_current_year_losses: Money
    general_current_year_gains: Money
    general_current_year_losses: Money
    aktien_pot: LossPotState | None
    general_pot: LossPotState | None
    total_taxable_after_loss_offset: Money
    sparerpauschbetrag_total: Money
    sparerpauschbetrag_consumed: Money
    sparerpauschbetrag_remaining: Money
    taxable_after_allowance: Money
    abgeltungsteuer: Money
    solidaritaetszuschlag: Money
def run_pipeline(ledger: TaxYearLedger) -> TaxYearSummary
```

### app/ports/repository.py

```python
class TransactionNotFoundError(Exception):
    def __init__(self, transaction_id: str)
class RepositoryCorruptedError(Exception):
class TransactionRepository(Protocol):
    def load_all(self) -> list[Transaction]
    def save_all(self, transactions: Sequence[Transaction]) -> None
    def add(self, transaction: Transaction) -> None
    def update(self, transaction: Transaction) -> None
    def delete(self, transaction_id: str) -> None
    def get(self, transaction_id: str) -> Transaction
```

```python
class SellSimulationRequest(BaseModel):
    ticker: str
    shares: Decimal
    sell_price_native: Money
    sell_fx_rate_eur: Decimal
    sell_date: date
class LotConsumption(BaseModel):
    lot_index: int
    buy_transaction_id: str
    buy_date: date
    shares_consumed: Decimal
    cost_per_share_native: Money
    cost_per_share_eur: Money
    sell_price_eur: Money
    realised_gain_eur: Money
class PositionAfterSnapshot(BaseModel):
    open_shares_after: Decimal
    cost_basis_eur_after: Money
    unrealised_gain_eur_after: Money | None
    weight_pct_before: Decimal | None
    weight_pct_after: Decimal | None
    weight_change_pct: Decimal | None
class SellSimulation(BaseModel):
    request: SellSimulationRequest
    is_valid: bool
    validation_error: str | None
    lot_consumption: tuple[LotConsumption, ...]
    realised_gains: tuple[RealisedGain, ...]
    total_realised_gain_eur: Money
    marginal_tax: MarginalTaxImpact | None
    position_after: PositionAfterSnapshot | None
def simulate_sell(request: SellSimulationRequest, transactions: Sequence[Transaction], profile: TaxProfile, live_positions: dict[str, LivePosition], *, carryforward_eur_aktien: Money, carryforward_eur_general: Money, additional_dividend_income_eur: Money, additional_interest_income_eur: Money) -> SellSimulation
```

- `app/ui/pages/manage.py` — Manage Portfolio page — EUR-native transaction entry (ADR-005 / TICKET-009-revised).

- `app/ui/pages/research.py` — Research page — chart any ticker, owned or not.

- `app/ui/pages/tax.py` — Tax Dashboard page — Sparerpauschbetrag tracker, harvest opportunity, tax exposure.
